dashboard.label: Runs And Sessions
dashboard.description: Audit, diagnostics, metrics, and traces for local DefenseClaw and OpenClaw run and session investigation.

html.p: This page now combines the audit baseline with diagnostics-backed session state and queue context plus metrics-and-traces correlation for provider, model, token, cost, duration, and span activity. The current phase is still local and event-indexed rather than billing-authoritative or full distributed tracing.

search.query: `defenseclaw_run_inventory` | table run_id session_id count first_seen last_seen actions severities actors targets | head 15
`openclaw_diagnostics_session_inventory` | table run_id session_id session_key count event_names outcomes lanes reasons | head 15
`openclaw_diagnostics_base` | search session_id!="(unknown)" | timechart span=30m count by session_id limit=10 useother=t
`openclaw_session_state_events` | stats count by outcome | sort - count
`openclaw_session_state_events` | table timestamp session_id session_key run_id outcome reason status | sort - timestamp | head 25
`openclaw_run_attempt_events` | table timestamp run_id session_id session_key attempt outcome reason duration_ms | sort - timestamp | head 25

`openclaw_queue_lane_events` | stats avg(wait_ms) as avg_wait_ms max(wait_ms) as max_wait_ms values(lane) as lanes values(outcome) as outcomes by run_id session_id session_key | sort - max_wait_ms | head 20
`openclaw_message_processed_events` | stats count values(outcome) as outcomes values(reason) as reasons values(duration_ms) as durations by run_id session_id session_key | sort - count | head 20

panel.title: Metrics and trace correlation by run and session

search.query: `openclaw_metrics_base` | eval signal_name=metric_name | fields run_id session_id session_key provider model signal_name | append [ search `openclaw_usage_traces` | eval signal_name=span_name | fields run_id session_id session_key provider model signal_name ] | search run_id!="(unknown)" OR session_id!="(unknown)" | stats values(signal_name) as signals values(provider) as providers values(model) as models by run_id session_id session_key | sort run_id session_id | head 20

`openclaw_usage_traces` | search run_id!="(unknown)" OR session_id!="(unknown)" | table timestamp span_name run_id session_id session_key duration_ms provider model status | sort - timestamp | head 20
